sections.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle). Rules: Future passive: will be + V3 | Modal passive: can be / should be / must be / may be + V3 | Formula stays consistent: modal + be + V3 | Used often in formal writing, news, and instructions
sections.formula: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle)

examples.hindi: यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।
examples.english: This work will be completed tomorrow.

examples.hindi: इस समस्या को हल किया जा सकता है।
examples.english: This problem can be solved.

examples.hindi: यह नियम पालन किया जाना चाहिए।
examples.english: This rule should be followed.

examples.hindi: यह फॉर्म भरा जाना चाहिए।
examples.english: This form must be filled.

examples.hindi: यह letter कल भेजा जाएगा।
examples.english: This letter will be sent tomorrow.

examples.hindi: इस गलती को सुधारा जा सकता है।
examples.english: This mistake can be corrected.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle)

examples.hindi: यह decision जल्दी लिया जाना चाहिए।
examples.english: This decision should be taken quickly.

examples.hindi: यह जानकारी गुप्त रखी जानी चाहिए।
examples.english: This information must be kept secret.

examples.hindi: यह project अगले महीने शुरू किया जाएगा।
examples.english: This project will be started next month.

examples.hindi: यह सवाल आसानी से पूछा जा सकता है।
examples.english: This question can be asked easily.

examples.hindi: यह किताब पढ़ी जानी चाहिए।
examples.english: This book should be read.

examples.hindi: यह नियम सभी को पता होना चाहिए।
examples.english: This rule must be known to everyone.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle)

examples.hindi: यह मीटिंग अगले हफ्ते बुलाई जाएगी।
examples.english: This meeting will be called next week.

examples.hindi: इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
examples.english: This can be made better.

examples.hindi: हर student को यह notice पढ़ना चाहिए।
examples.english: This notice should be read by every student.

examples.hindi: यह काम समय पर पूरा किया जाना चाहिए।
examples.english: This work must be completed on time.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle)

examples.hindi: नई policy अगले साल लागू की जाएगी।
examples.english: The new policy will be implemented next year.

examples.hindi: इस मुद्दे पर चर्चा की जा सकती है।
examples.english: This issue can be discussed.

examples.hindi: हर नियम का पालन किया जाना चाहिए।
examples.english: Every rule should be followed.

examples.hindi: यह जिम्मेदारी उठाई जानी चाहिए।
examples.english: This responsibility must be taken.
